title: Luffy Returns From the Mirror World
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Nami, Luffy, Unknown person #8 as The Straw Hats break through Big Mom’s encirclement as allies buy time and Luffy’s fight reaches its conclusion.
scene: Luffy escapes the mirror world while Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates help the crew break through Big Mom’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pekoms!! Why are you the one who's coming out of the mirror?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Uh... um... don't move, big mom pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If any of you try any tricks, your precious family member, BRILEe,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In any case, I'll be exposed by this trans- formation....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm going to let straw hat escape!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's the man that big bro Pedro gambled his life on!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He's transform- ing into his ruling form!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you do that, you're going to go on a rampage!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, hey, what's going on here...? It wasn't Katakuri who came out from the mirror...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nor was it straw hat...! On top of that, my precious little sister has been taken without any reason...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's almost worth some praise that he was able to...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: out wit wit wit with big brother Katakuri and make it out here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That jumping makes you an easy target!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Finale storyline with 45 dialogue beats. The crew escapes Totto Land through the sacrifices and timing of Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates.
